title: Ragada
subTitle: Satya, a money-minded man, arrives in Hyderabad and starts working for a gangster, GK. However, he soon becomes the target of another gangster, Peddanna.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Ummadi Kutumbam
subTitle: Three loving brothers, who are all married, live together as a joint family. However, misunderstandings crop up and threaten their relationships with each other.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Kirathakudu
subTitle: Charan, a sportsman, hates his father, Chakravarthy, who is a CBI officer. However, when Chakravarthy gets kidnapped by the criminal gang he was chasing, Charan decides to save him.

title: Balaram
subTitle: Tough policeman Balaram meets two lovers by accident. His endeavour to unite the lovers brings him into a direct clash with a rich businessman, who is the father of the girl.

title: Aahvaanam
subTitle: Ravi Kumar, a money-minded man, decides to end his marriage with Rajeshwari after learning that Sireesha, a rich woman, is interested in him. He lies to Sireesha that he has applied for a divorce.

title: Major Chandrakanth
subTitle: After Mohan kills his sister's lover, he runs away and hides in Major Chandrakanth's house. Later, Srikanth, the older son of Chandrakanth, is assigned the case.

title: Billa
subTitle: When Billa, a don, dies at the hands of ACP Murthy, he is replaced by Ranga, his lookalike, to infiltrate the gang. When Murthy is killed, Ranga is trapped since only Murthy knew the truth.

title: Katamarayudu
subTitle: In an attempt to give up his violent past, a man decides to change himself for the woman he loves. Soon, when his lover's family is threatened by evil forces, he takes matters into his own hands.

title: Pelli Pustakam
subTitle: A married couple face a financial crisis, but the company that offers them a job does not recruit couples. To solve their problems, they decide to lie about their marital status.

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Mee Adbutha Samayam
subTitle: A religious scholar reads verses from the Bible and highlights the virtues of Jesus Christ. He further encourages His followers to lead a pious life.

title: Athanu Aame Inthalo Eeme
subTitle: Circumstances force Chandram to act as a husband of two women. However, he soon finds himself caught between the women and tries to cope with the situation.

title: V
subTitle: A celebrated police officer's run of success is shockingly interrupted by V, a mysterious killer, who specifically challenges him to end his killing spree.

title: Dongodu
subTitle: Madhava, a thief, pretends to be in love with the daughter of the landlord, who procures his father's property using dishonest means. The landlord then tries to frame Madhava for theft.

title: Asthram
subTitle: After his family is affected by a terrorist attack, Siddharth, an honest IPS officer, spends the rest of his life fighting against crime and eradicating terrorism from the country.

title: Bhadrachalam
subTitle: When Parasuram's ace student insults him, he gets a heart attack. Later, his daughter, Laxmi, trains Bhadrachalam, an athlete, to compete against a rival and win.

title: Potugadu
subTitle: Two men serendipitously encounter each other as they decide to commit suicide. However, things take a turn as the duo bond over their personal life story and dilemmas.

title: Sambarala Rambabu
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Gangmaster
subTitle: Chakraborty, a goon, wants to avenge his younger brother's murder by killing Purushottam's daughter, Pooja. However, Raja, a lecturer in her college, promises Purushottam to protect her.

title: The Lords Challenge
subTitle: A religious scholar delivers a discourse about the teachings of the Bible to urge the devotees to follow a righteous path.

title: Allare Allari
subTitle: Ramulamma, a widow, is imprisoned after killing the murderers of her husband. Before leaving, she promises her daughter's hand in marriage to her nephew, but things take a turn in her absence.

title: Adhinetha
subTitle: An unemployed commoner is drifting aimlessly in life but also helping people. When he gets the opportunity to become the chief minister, he decides to use his power for good.

title: Loafar
subTitle: Raja, who thinks his mother is dead, turns into a thief. However, his life changes when he falls for Mounika, a girl who is escaping a forced marriage, and eventually meets her aunt.

title: Kondaveeti Raja
subTitle: An archaeologist's assistant goes to a village to unearth the secret to a hidden treasure. However, he faces competition from a rich man who had killed his sister.

title: Aadi
subTitle: Aadi, who is raised by his father's faithful employee, learns about how his parents were cheated and killed by Nagi Reddy. Enraged by the injustice done to his family, he decides to confront Nagi.

title: Dorasani
subTitle: Raju, who belongs to a poor family, falls in love with Dorasani, the daughter of a rich landlord. However, her father stands as a stumbling block to their relationship.
